Murgh Makhani

"Midnight cravings deserve unforgettable flavors."

Since 2018

Where Chennai's Midnight Cravings Come Alive

Located at the heart of Ambattur on Madras Thiruvallur High Road, V4 Midnight Dhabha is Chennai's premier destination for night food seekers. We offer an authentic Punjabi dhaba style experience combined with the airy charm of a modern urban rooftop.

Every dish is prepared using fresh ingredients, hand-pounded spices, and traditional clay tandoors to lock in those robust, smoky flavors you crave after a long day.

★

Smoky Tandoors

Traditional clay cooking for authentic Indian flavors.

☾

Open Till 2 AM

Your ultimate destination for late-night food runs.

₹

Budget Friendly

Premium flavors without the premium price tags.

☁

Rooftop Seating

Cool breeze and warm lighting under the night sky.

Handcrafted Flavor

Explore Our Bestsellers

Sizzling, spicy, and creamy Punjabi classics curated to conquer your hunger pangs.

Best Seller
Punjabi Curries Non-Veg

Butter Chicken

₹340

Tender tandoori chicken simmered in rich, creamy tomato gravy with a touch of butter and dry fenugreek leaves.

★ 4.9 (1,200+ orders)
Chef's Special
Tandoori & Grills Non-Veg

Tandoori Tiger Prawns

₹480

Plump jumbo tiger prawns marinated in a spicy yogurt seasoning and char-grilled to juicy perfection in our clay oven.

★ 4.8 (850+ orders)
Spicy
Indo-Chinese Non-Veg

Chilli Chicken

₹280

Crispy batter-fried chicken bites tossed with fresh bell peppers, onions, and green chilies in a spicy soy-garlic glaze.

★ 4.7 (950+ orders)
Classic
Tandoori & Grills Non-Veg

Tandoori Chicken

₹290

Whole chicken marinated in traditional spices, yogurt, and mustard oil, roasted inside the clay tandoor. Served with green chutney.

★ 4.8 (1,100+ orders)
Quick Bite
Indo-Chinese Non-Veg

Chicken Fried Rice

₹240

Aromatic long grain basmati rice wok-tossed with shredded chicken, scrambled eggs, fresh farm veggies, and spring onion greens.

★ 4.6 (1,400+ orders)
Super Saver
Punjabi Curries Veg Option Available

North Indian Combo

₹390

A hearty platter featuring Butter Naan, Dal Makhani, Paneer Butter Masala, Jeera Rice, Salad, and Sweet Gulab Jamun.

★ 4.9 (1,600+ orders)
Party Favorite
Tandoori & Grills Non-Veg

Grilled Specials Platter

₹580

An ultimate assortment of Seekh Kebab, Chicken Tikka, Haryali Kebab, and Fish Tikka served on a sizzling hot iron plate.

★ 4.9 (650+ orders)
The V4 Standard

Why Dine With Us?

Combining great atmosphere, quality cooking, and fast service to elevate your midnight hunger runs.

Rooftop Dining Experience

Enjoy Chennai's soothing evening breeze with comfortable open-air tables, glowing warm fairy lights, and stellar views.

Open Till 2:00 AM

Whether it is post-work exhaustion or late-night study breaks, our tandoors burn bright until 2 AM to fuel your appetite.

Authentic Punjabi Taste

We follow traditional recipe templates, slow-simmering gravies with dollops of real butter and custom spice blends.

Affordable Pricing

Enjoy rich portions and satisfying feasts with average meal values priced between ₹200 to ₹600. Great food, fair price.

Swift Service

Your hunger won't wait. Our kitchen is optimized for minimal waiting times, ensuring hot sizzling meals reach you quickly.

Family & Group Welcoming

Offering comfortable wide-bench dining zones, a welcoming vibe, and mild menu combinations suitable for kids and seniors.

Testimonials

Loved By 3,300+ Foodies

Check out honest ratings and reviews from food lovers in Ambattur and beyond.

“
★★★★★

The rooftop seating at V4 Midnight Dhabha is spectacular, especially at night with the cool breeze. Their Butter Chicken and Butter Naan is a heavenly combination! Highly recommend their chicken items. Prices are very reasonable.

AS

Akash Srinivasan

Google Local Guide

“
★★★★★

Midnight cravings sorted! This place is open till 2 AM. The Tandoori Chicken is juicy, smoky, and absolutely delicious. Finding rooftop seating in Ambattur at these rates is amazing. We visit almost every weekend.

PP

Priyanka Patel

College Student

“
★★★★☆

Excellent portions for the price. We ordered the North Indian Combo and Chilli Chicken. Authentic taste and fast service. The staff is polite, and the rooftop has a great lively urban vibe. Safe environment for family dining.

RK

Rajesh Kumar

IT Professional

Visual Feast

Fast Deliveries

Your Midnight Cravings Delivered Fast

Too comfortable in bed? Or working overtime at the office? Do not compromise on flavor. Order directly online via Zomato or Swiggy and get piping hot Punjabi food delivered to your doorstep within 30 minutes.

zomato

Average delivery rating 4.2★ with fast riders.

Order On Zomato
swiggy

Superfast home delivery with Swiggy One offers.

Order On Swiggy

V4 Midnight Dhabha

Serving Ambattur's favorite late-night Punjabi and North Indian culinary delicacies under a starry rooftop ambiance. Authentic tastes, affordable pricing, and fast delivery.
